heading: Crafting digital experiences with precision
paragraphs: I'm a frontend developer passionate about building modern web applications that are fast, accessible, and beautiful. I specialize in Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

With additional experience in Node.js and PostgreSQL, I bring a full understanding of the stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to reliable APIs. I focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and delivering exceptional user experiences.
